message:
Refactor Astro components to use design tokens

Replace hardcoded CSS values with --tnz-* design system tokens across
all Astro components for consistent styling. Add missing tokens to
design-system-core.css including shadow variant, spacing value, and
TQL syntax highlighting colors. Fix media query typo in
InteractiveDocsStructure.astro.

Components updated: InteractiveDocsStructure, MobileMenuToggle,
NodeSizingCalculator, PageTitle, Sidebar, TenzirFooter.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -44,7 +44,7 @@ Use `tql` as the language identifier for Tenzir Query Language:
 ```tql
 from {x: 42}
 where x > 0
-````
+```
